# Growthik Media
> growthikmedia.com | Digital Marketing & AI Search Optimization Agency in Pune, India.

Growthik Media is a results-driven digital marketing agency specializing in high-performance web development, technical SEO, and data-backed performance marketing for businesses looking to scale within the Indian market.

## Core Services
- **Technical SEO:** Enterprise-grade organic growth strategy.
- **PPC & Performance Marketing:** High-ROI campaigns on Google & Meta.
- **Next.js Web Development:** Fastest-in-class, ROI-focused web systems.
- **Brand Strategy:** Defining identity through identity, naming, and design.
- **Social Media Marketing:** Multi-channel authority building.
